overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a spacesuit exploring a stone settlement building at dusk. The character approaches an NPC at a balcony overlooking the town, briefly interacts, then turns and walks down an interior corridor toward a wall terminal.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered stone corridor with arched openings on one side revealing a settlement view at dusk. The stone walls flank both sides as the character approaches an NPC standing near a wooden railing, slowing down as they get closer.

scene_state.functional_zone: balcony overlook with wooden railing and hanging lantern

events.description: character turns away from the NPC to walk down the interior corridor

agents.ego_description: standing face-to-face with the NPC near the arched opening, appearing to engage in conversation

notable_agents.action: facing the player character near the balcony railing, having turned from looking at the view

entered.detail: lit lantern hanging from the ceiling near the archway providing warm light

segments.scene_description: The character stops at the balcony overlook, facing an NPC near the wooden railing. A hanging lantern provides warm illumination as they appear to interact, with the settlement view still visible through the archway behind the NPC.

scene_state.functional_zone: interior stone corridor with wall terminal

events.description: character stops in front of the wall terminal at the end of the corridor

agents.ego_description: turning away from the NPC and walking down the darker interior corridor toward a wall-mounted terminal

entered.detail: electronic terminal mounted on the stone wall at the end of the corridor

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks away from the NPC into a darker interior stone corridor, leaving the balcony behind. The enclosed space leads to a wall terminal where the character stops, with no sky visible and only dim artificial lighting illuminating the stone walls.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a breezy, open-air stone balcony at dusk into the dim, enclosed depths of a settlement building. It begins with the character walking along a covered stone corridor, passing arched openings that reveal a wide view of the town as they approach an NPC by a wooden railing. As the character stops to interact, the scene is bathed in the warm glow of a hanging lantern against the fading twilight of the exterior. The camera then follows the character as they turn away from the light and the open air, retreating into a darker interior corridor. This enclosed space shifts the atmosphere to one of dim artificial lighting before finally coming to a halt at a wall terminal embedded in the stone.
